hero.title: Become a Property Owner at
hero.description: Invest once, earn forever. Join our family of successful property owners and secure your future with luxury real estate.

benefits.title: Lifetime Profit Share
benefits.desc: Become a property owner and enjoy a guaranteed yearly profit for a lifetime.

benefits.title: Free Luxury Stay
benefits.desc: Enjoy 2 days of complimentary stay every year at our world-class resorts.

benefits.title: Club Membership
benefits.desc: Exclusive 6-year membership to the prestigious Akashbari Club with premium perks.
